team_name: TenderSense AI: Explainable Tender Evaluation & Bidder Eligibility Platform
summary: Design an AI platform (TenderSense AI) for automating tender evaluation and bidder eligibility analysis in government procurement, reducing manual effort, improving consistency, ensuring transparency, and generating explainable audit-ready reports.
optimization_claims: Reduce evaluation time from days to minutes
constraints_addressed: Prone to inconsistency and human error
Difficult to audit and justify decisions
Complex comparison due to bidder submitting documents in different formats
